name: 🏰 Rogue Dungeon 🏰
description:
Simple rogue-like dungeon crawler.


🛡️ Current Classes (more class sets planned...)

Each has a Passive Skill (always active) and an Active Skill (uses mana):

| Class | Passive Skill | Active Skill |

|-------|---------------|--------------|

| Warrior | +15% DAMAGE | Battle Cry – boosts ATTACK for 3 turns (20 MP) |

| Mage | +10 MP per turn | Fireball – deals heavy DAMAGE (25 MP) |

| Rogue | +15% DODGE | Shadow Strike – attack TWICE in a turn (15 MP) |

| Cleric | +10 HP per turn | Heal – restore HP + minor shield for 1 turn (20 MP) |

| Necromancer | +10% LIFESTEAL | Summon Skeleton – summon ALLY with moderate HP (25 MP) |

| Ranger | +10% CRIT CHANCE | Arrow Rain – hits ALL ENEMIES + small chance to STUN (20 MP) |


🗡️ Available Commands

- enter dungeon – begin exploring

- explore – move deeper into the dungeon

- search – look for items, secrets, or hidden paths

- examine [item] – inspect an item, object, or artifact for clues or quest progress

- interact [object] – open doors, pull levers, or manipulate environment elements

- kill – attack monsters

- use [active skill] – use class ability (consumes mana)

- drink potion <health/mana> – restore HP or MP

- loot – check defeated monsters for items

- equip [item] – change weapon or armor

- status – show current stats, potions, and gear

- return to town – leave dungeon voluntarily
creator: Chad GPT
